summary: Nasdaq introduces fast-track index rules; market cautiously optimistic. Art sector: Global art market recovery +4% in 2025; Chance AI debuts Visual Agent tech.

Market Update (March 31, 2026): Nasdaq/S&P 500 under pressure due to AI concerns; Energy/Utilities gain. Art Market: 2025 growth (+4%) continues to influence 2026 trends; strong Old Masters performance.
